purpose: push the current skill-side AGENTS/README templates back through Octopus_OS root, container roots, and the Mother_Doc docs tree, then resync the registry
stage_runtime_rules: push regenerates root/container AGENTS.md and README.md from the skill-managed generation model
push refreshes Mother_Doc docs AGENTS.md navigation and preserves docs README current state except missing-file initialization
push must rescan and recollect so registry.json stays aligned with the current external tree

source_of_truth.mother_doc_docs_readme: current external state unless navigation initializes a missing file
